payload.description: Track, Structures, Stations and Facilities Metro-North Railroad

payload.raw_value_text: 1,480 miles planned, 2 runs per year per FRA

payload.description: Undergrade Bridge Timbers (NY only – 586 Timbers Planned)
Bridge Timbers (CT only – 393 Timbers Planned)

Bridge Flag Repairs on Harlem, Hudson, New Haven-NY/Port Jervis Line. Typical repairs include replacing deteriorated members, rebuilding deteriorated bridge seats, repairing abutment walls, repairing load bearing supports, timber deck replacements.
Flag repairs, steel repairs, concrete repairs, masonry arch repairs, bridge removal on Hudson and Port Jervis lines
Bridge timbers replacement program for CT bridges
Steel/Masonry Repairs at Steamboat Road, Sound Shore Drive, Mill Plain Road, Fairfield Creek, Union Street
Steel repairs, Phase 1

Mount Vernon West Yard Cleanup & Grading, Harmon Yard Track Compound Paving, North White Plains Work Equipment Area Paving, CP 235 Staircase for CIL Access, Hudson/Harlem Line Transmission Pole Repairs, Remove Catenary Poles on Danbury Line
Fabricated/install steel ties, install expansion and thick web miter rails on Track 1 and Track 3
Install/repair 500' ft of fence throughout systemwide. CP 271 to CP 272 Security Fencing – Tracks 4, 5
Hudson & Harlem - cleaned graffiti off various buildings, bridges, retaining walls & rock cuts

44 Platforms systemwide, 3 Platforms Planned. Track 21: 115 bracket ties, 500 block ties (100% complete). Bumping Post Installation: Track 17 (100% complete), Track 18 (100% complete). Track 103: 67 bracket ties, 750 block ties, 1,500' of rail (100% complete)
